name: aetherbourne
description: - **Observer-centric simulation**: The world is simulated from the perspective of observers, not omnisciently. - **Emergence over scripting**: Behaviors and events arise from systems, not from hardcoded scripts. - **Everything is systemic, not hardcoded**: All elements interact through systems, avoiding one-off logic. - **Cause → Effect → Feedback Loops**: Every action has consequences, and feedback loops drive ongoing change.
